channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: Alishahryar1 / free-claude-code
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 8,807 → 10,179 (+1372) | Ranked #1
Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw
Language: Python 2,638 stars today

item.title: huggingface / ml-intern
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 5,292 → 5,747 (+455) | Ranked #2
🤗 ml-intern: an open-source ML engineer that reads papers, trains models, and ships ML models
Language: Python 2,985 stars today

item.title: google / osv-scanner
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 9,489 → 9,664 (+175) | Ranked #3

Language: Go 141 stars today

item.title: Z4nzu / hackingtool

⭐ Stars: 62,317 → 62,759 (+442) | Ranked #4

Language: Python 1,378 stars today

item.title: zilliztech / claude-context
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 8,990 → 9,169 (+179) | Ranked #5
Code search MCP for Claude Code. Make entire codebase the context for any coding agent.
Language: TypeScript 706 stars today

item.title: open-metadata / OpenMetadata
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 13,344 → 13,479 (+135) | Ranked #6
OpenMetadata is a unified metadata platform for data discovery, data observability, and data governance powered by a central metadata repository, in-depth column level lineage, and seamless team collaboration.
Language: TypeScript 530 stars today

item.title: PostHog / posthog
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 33,091 → 33,247 (+156) | Ranked #7
🦔 PostHog is an all-in-one developer platform for building successful products. We offer product analytics, web analytics, session replay, error tracking, feature flags, experimentation, surveys, data warehouse, a CDP, and an AI product assistant to help debug your code, ship features faster, and keep all your usage and customer data in one stack.
Language: Python 85 stars today

item.title: dani-garcia / vaultwarden
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 59,163 → 59,229 (+66) | Ranked #8
Unofficial Bitwarden compatible server written in Rust, formerly known as bitwarden_rs
Language: Rust 268 stars today

item.title: Anil-matcha / Open-Generative-AI
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 7,660 → 7,904 (+244) | Ranked #9
Uncensored, open-source alternative to Higgsfield AI, Freepik AI, Krea AI, Openart AI — Free, unrestricted AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.
Language: JavaScript 842 stars today

item.title: codecrafters-io / build-your-own-x
